title: lobelia santos-limae
intro: Lobelia santos-limae, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, Lobelia has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in alkaloids, which have been shown to have a positive effect on the nervous system, providing relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia. Lobelia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its health benefits to be utilized in a range of applications.
